signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts; no breaking announcements today (Apr 18, 2026) confirmed, resolved, or newly released to shift prediction markets.[1]**

signals.headline: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again despite US blockade remaining in place | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again despite US blockade remaining in place | YES | HIGH confidence**

Iran has re-closed the critical Strait of Hormuz in response to the U.S. maintaining its blockade on Iranian ships and ports[1]. Iranian gunboats fired at tankers in the Strait early Saturday, according to British military reports[4]. This reversal occurred after Iran had fully reopened the waterwa
